# `CLIPlugin`

Immutable plugin definition registered via `CLIBuilder.plugin()`.

Use plugin to construct values of this shape instead of manually
assembling the object.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/cli/plugin.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/cli/plugin.ts:67`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/cli/plugin.ts#L67)

## Signatures

```ts
interface CLIPlugin {}
```

## Members

### Properties

#### `hooks`

Lifecycle hooks implemented by the plugin.

```ts
hooks: CLIPluginHooks;
```

#### `name`

Optional label for diagnostics and debugging.

```ts
name: string | undefined;
```
